_description: Known model intent bypass patterns detected by continuous-improvement-analyst. Each pattern has detection rules and the HARD GATE that should prevent it.

patterns.name: Test gate bypass
patterns.description: Model declares partial test results 'good enough' and proceeds to validation
patterns.hard_gate: STEP 5 test gate in implement.md

indicators: Test failures > 0 when STEP 6 agents invoked
Coordinator output contains: 'good enough', 'solid foundation', 'most tests pass', 'acceptable coverage'

patterns.name: Stub as implementation
patterns.description: Model replaces broken code with NotImplementedError or pass placeholders
patterns.hard_gate: No Stubs HARD GATE in implementer.md

indicators: New files contain 'raise NotImplementedError'
New files contain 'pass  # TODO'
New files contain 'raise NotImplemented'

patterns.name: Hook registration skip
patterns.description: Hook file created but not registered in settings templates or manifest
patterns.hard_gate: STEP 5.5 hook registration check in implement.md

indicators: Hook .py file written but settings templates not modified
Hook .py file written but install_manifest.json not modified

patterns.name: Missing terminal actions
patterns.description: Pipeline completes without push or issue close
patterns.hard_gate: STEP B4/STEP 8 in implement.md

indicators: Pipeline mode=batch-issues but no 'gh issue close' in logs
Pipeline mode=batch but no 'git push' in logs
AUTO_GIT_PUSH=true but no push action logged

patterns.name: Context compression
patterns.description: Coordinator passes summarized output to next agent instead of full results
patterns.hard_gate: COORDINATOR FORBIDDEN LIST in implement.md

indicators: Agent Task prompt significantly shorter than previous agent output (>80% reduction)
Phrases in coordinator: 'in summary', 'the key points are', 'briefly'

patterns.name: Pipeline step skipping
patterns.description: One or more pipeline steps not executed without explicit user override
patterns.hard_gate: COORDINATOR FORBIDDEN LIST in implement.md

indicators: Full pipeline mode but fewer than 8 agent invocations
Expected agent type not found in session logs
STEP numbers not sequential in log timeline

patterns.name: Command routing bypass
patterns.description: UserPromptSubmit nudge fired suggesting /implement but model proceeded with raw edits
patterns.hard_gate: CLAUDE.md Critical Rules: 'Use the right command for every action'

indicators: UserPromptSubmit log contains workflow nudge text but subsequent tool calls are raw Write/Edit without pipeline context
Code files modified outside any /implement pipeline session
No pipeline_state.json created despite code changes

patterns.name: Error silently dropped
patterns.description: PostToolUse error not followed by a fix attempt
patterns.hard_gate: Pipeline should address all errors before proceeding

indicators: PostToolUse entry with error/failure output followed by unrelated tool call
Bash command exit code non-zero but next action doesn't address the failure
Test failure logged but no subsequent test-related tool calls

patterns.name: Stop hook softened language
patterns.description: Stop hook assistant text uses softened language when errors/failures exist in the session
patterns.hard_gate: Model should accurately report failures, not soften them

indicators: Stop hook text matches softened_language_indicators AND session has unresolved errors
Final summary declares success but PostToolUse logs contain unaddressed failures
Stop text says 'most' or 'nearly' when describing test/build results with failures

patterns.name: Hook silent failure
patterns.description: Expected hook layer missing entirely from session logs
patterns.hard_gate: All 4 hook layers must fire: UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop

indicators: Session has tool calls but zero PreToolUse entries (hook not registered)
Session has tool calls but zero PostToolUse entries (hook not registered)
Session has user messages but zero UserPromptSubmit entries
Session completed but zero Stop entries

patterns.name: Prompt file classified as doc to bypass pipeline
patterns.description: Model classifies agents/*.md or commands/*.md as 'documentation' to justify direct Edit calls, bypassing /implement pipeline including TDD, security review, and CI gates
patterns.hard_gate: CLAUDE.md Critical Rules: NEVER direct-edit agents/*.md, commands/*.md, hooks/*.py, lib/*.py

indicators: Edit tool used on plugins/autonomous-dev/agents/*.md without preceding pipeline_state entry
Edit tool used on plugins/autonomous-dev/commands/*.md without preceding pipeline_state entry
Stop hook text contains 'markdown prompt files, not code' or 'direct editing is appropriate'

patterns.name: Plan Mode used to justify direct prompt file edits
patterns.description: Model exits plan mode with approved plan, then uses 'plan called for .md changes' reasoning to bypass /implement and directly edit agents/*.md or commands/*.md
patterns.hard_gate: CLAUDE.md Critical Rules: NEVER direct-edit agents/*.md, commands/*.md + plan_mode_exit_detector hook (Issue #358)

indicators: Stop hook text contains 'plan explicitly called for' or 'prompt-only changes' AND Edit tool used on agents/*.md or commands/*.md
Edit on agents/*.md or commands/*.md within 60 seconds of ExitPlanMode with no preceding pipeline_state.json creation
Stop hook text contains 'markdown prompt files, not code'

patterns.name: Skip accumulation across sessions
patterns.description: Model adds @pytest.mark.skip to failing tests instead of fixing them, accumulating skipped tests across sessions that are never resolved
patterns.hard_gate: No New Skips HARD GATE in implementer.md and implement.md STEP 5

indicators: New @pytest.mark.skip additions in committed test files
Skip count increases between sessions
Tests marked 'TDD RED phase - implementation pending' persist across multiple sessions

patterns.name: Batch issues grouped into single pipeline
patterns.description: Coordinator runs a single shared pipeline for all batch issues instead of per-issue dedicated pipelines. All test files for multiple issues written in the same time window. Agent count is 5-7 total, not 9 per issue.
patterns.hard_gate: STEP B3 point 4: Per-Issue Agent Count Verification

indicators: Batch session has fewer than 9 * num_issues total Agent invocations
Multiple issues' test files created within the same 60-second window
A single pipeline pass covers all issues instead of sequential per-issue pipelines
Total agent count equals a single pipeline (5-9) rather than N pipelines, indicating issues were grouped or combined

patterns.remediation: Process each issue sequentially with a dedicated 9-agent pipeline. Verify agent count per issue before advancing.

patterns.name: Batch progressive shortcutting
patterns.description: Model runs full pipeline for early issues but progressively reduces agents for later issues in batch mode
patterns.hard_gate: STEP B3 point 4 Per-Issue Agent Count HARD GATE in implement-batch.md

indicators: Issue N+1 has fewer agent invocations than issue N in same batch
Later issues in batch missing researcher, reviewer, or security-auditor agents
Batch session has fewer than 9 * num_issues total agent invocations

patterns.name: Sequential steps incorrectly parallelized
patterns.description: Pipeline steps that must be sequential (e.g., test-master → implementer) were launched in the same message window
patterns.hard_gate: COORDINATOR FORBIDDEN LIST in implement.md: 'Combining or parallelizing sequential steps'

indicators: test-master and implementer launched within 5 seconds of each other
planner and implementer launched within 5 seconds
implementer and reviewer launched within 5 seconds

patterns.name: Parallel steps unnecessarily serialized
patterns.description: Pipeline steps that should run in parallel (e.g., both researchers) were run sequentially

indicators: researcher-local and researcher launched more than 30 seconds apart
reviewer, security-auditor, doc-master launched more than 30 seconds apart

patterns.name: Context dropping between agents
patterns.description: Agent prompt word count is less than 20% of prior agent result word count, suggesting coordinator summarized instead of passing full results
patterns.hard_gate: COORDINATOR FORBIDDEN LIST in implement.md: 'Summarizing agent output instead of passing full results'

indicators: Agent prompt_word_count / prior agent result_word_count < 0.2
Coordinator output contains summarization phrases: 'in summary', 'key points are', 'briefly'

patterns.name: Hard gate ordering bypass
patterns.description: STEP 6 validation agents (reviewer, security-auditor, doc-master) launched before STEP 5 test gate passed
patterns.hard_gate: STEP 5 test gate HARD GATE + COORDINATOR FORBIDDEN LIST: 'Running STEP 6 before STEP 5 passes'

indicators: STEP 6 agent timestamps earlier than any successful test_run timestamp
No test_run entries but STEP 6 agents present
test_run with success=false followed by STEP 6 agent invocations

patterns.name: Reviewer BLOCKING issues ignored
patterns.description: Reviewer agent returned BLOCKING issues but no subsequent fix commits were made
patterns.hard_gate: Reviewer BLOCKING requires fix before proceeding

indicators: Reviewer result contains 'BLOCKING' but no subsequent Edit/Write tool calls to the flagged files
Reviewer result contains 'APPROVAL: NO' but pipeline proceeded to doc-master
Security-auditor result contains 'FAIL' but no subsequent fix

patterns.name: Research skipped for entire batch
patterns.description: Both researcher-local and researcher agents skipped for all issues in a batch using pre-researched content exemption. While skipping research for a single issue with fresh /create-issue cache is valid, skipping for ALL issues suggests the exemption is being over-applied.
patterns.hard_gate: STEP 4 research agents in implement.md

indicators: All issues in batch have researcher-local and researcher marked as skipped
Justification contains 'pre-researched' or 'issue body' for every issue
No issue in batch actually ran research agents

patterns.constraint: Research skip is valid per-issue when /create-issue provided rich content. Flag as WARNING (not CRITICAL) when >50% of batch issues skip research.

batch-issues.note: All required_agents apply per issue, not per batch. Each issue gets a dedicated pipeline with all agents. test-master only in --tdd-first mode. See Issue #386, #404.
